title: Fear
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Fear''''' was an Imperial [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]] that attempted to stop ''[[Yali]]'' and [[Maria (MC80 Star Cruiser)|''Maria'']] on their way to [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]. She was destroyed on that attempt by combined efforts of fleets and [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron's]] [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wings]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-03-XX -->''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
